allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; routes=[r['summary'] if 'summary' in r else p for p,v in json.load\(sys.stdin\)['paths'].items\(\) for m,r in v.items\(\) if 'admin' in p]; print\('\\n'.join\(routes\)\)")
